title: Lewis Martin (Australian politician)
extract: Lewis Ormsby Martin (16 May 1870 – 17 April 1944) was an Australian politician who was a Member for Oxley from 1927 to 1941, Member of the NSW Legislative Assembly from 1927 to 1941, Secretary for Public Works and Minister for Local Government from 1932 to 1939 and Minister for Justice from 1932 to 1939.
